name: OpenLibrary — idempotency test (add twice, count stays the same)
description: Showcases: idempotency — adding the same books a second time is a no-op. The shelf count must be {{limit}} after both add passes, not {{limit}}*2. Books already on the shelf are silently skipped by ol_add_to_shelf. Also demonstrates that re-running ol_collect_books with the same query safely refreshes context.collected_items.

steps.description: First pass: collect {{limit}} {{query}} books published before {{max_year}}
First add — all {{limit}} books shelved for the first time
After first add: assert exactly {{limit}} books on shelf
Second pass: collect the exact same {{limit}} {{query}} books (context.collected_items refreshed)
Second add — every book already on shelf → all silently skipped
After second add: count must STILL be {{limit}}, not {{limit}}*2 — idempotency confirmed
